mechanism: QT-fiscal crowding-out adds 50-100bp to corporate cost of capital embedded in the risk-free rate component rather than appearing as credit spread, making it invisible in standard WACC calculations and compressing the apparent ROIC-WACC spread beyond what is recognized.
regime_dependence: Holds during periods of simultaneous QT and large fiscal deficits requiring substantial private-sector Treasury absorption. Weakens if QT ends or fiscal deficits narrow.
